summary: SINGLE_FOCUS two-phase: 12 visible rooms with '...' suffix. Phase 1: ValueTracker shift_tr slides each BLUE guest from room n to n+1 via always_redraw; YELLOW new guest pops into room 1 at s>0.5. Phase 2: shift_tr2 sends guest n → room 2n (BLUE dots spread out); ORANGE bus-guests fill odd rooms 1, 3, 5, .... Captions explain ∞+1 = ∞+∞ = ℵ₀.
